primaryQuestion: Does this read as front-facing running rather than a warped still image?
answer: pass: the sequence shows whole-character model-generated front-facing running with alternating knees, opposite arm pump, support/float rhythm, and stable identity.

gateResults.source_framing_gate: pass_with_minor_note: full body stays visible with green margin; no damaging crop observed in selected segment
gateResults.soft_control_gate: pass: 24-frame plan and controls exist as reference evidence
gateResults.alternating_locomotion_gate: pass: left/right leg phases visibly alternate
gateResults.contact_support_gate: pass: feet/shadow/contact rhythm reads as running-in-place
gateResults.sequence_evidence_gate: pass: 24 consecutive frames copied from one continuous generated video segment
gateResults.v3_occlusion_overlap_gate: pass_with_minor_note: small model flicker in hands/boots, no broken joints or holes
gateResults.canvas_stability_gate: pass: fixed green background and centered camera in selected segment

knownResidualRisks: AI video has mild suit-detail flicker between frames.
This is a generated whole-character run, not a rigged controllable character.
Loop seam is acceptable for review but not mathematically perfect.
